SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.allocation

Class RecoveryFactorExtractor

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.allocation.RecoveryFactorExtractor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class RecoveryFactorExtractor extends Object implements Serializable
Extracts frozen per-unit per-component split (recovery) factors from a rigorous base-case ProcessSystem run.

After the process has been solved once with a single common component slate, this extractor walks every conservative process unit and computes, for each outlet stream and component, the fraction of that component leaving through the outlet:

$$f_u(s,k) = \frac{\dot{n}_{s,k}^{\,out}}{\sum_{i\in inlets} \dot{n}_{i,k}^{\,in}}$$

The result is a UnitSplit per unit and a master component slate (the union of all component names found across the process). These frozen factors are the basis for the linear allocation network — see AllocationNetwork and SourceAllocator.

Stream objects are skipped as nodes (they are edges in the proxy network). Reactive or contacting units (reactors, absorbers) are still captured as black boxes; their factors reflect whatever component redistribution the base case produced, but for strictly mass-conserving allocation the scope is conservative separation / scrubber / column / valve / cooler / mixer / splitter networks.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    buildMasterSlate()
    Builds the master component slate (union of component names) and per-component molar masses by scanning every node unit's inlet and outlet streams.
    private void
    buildUnitSplits()
    Builds a UnitSplit for every node unit using the master component slate.
    private void
    collectComponents(List<StreamInterface> streams)
    Registers all component names (and molar masses) found in a list of streams into the master slate, preserving first-seen order.

    componentFlow(StreamInterface stream, String componentName)
    Gets the total molar flow of a named component in a stream (mole/sec), or zero if the component is not present in that stream.

  • Constructor Details

    • RecoveryFactorExtractor

      public RecoveryFactorExtractor(ProcessSystem process)
      Creates an extractor for a base-case process.
      Parameters:
      process - the base-case process system; must already have been run; must be non-null

  • Method Details

    • extract

      public RecoveryFactorExtractor extract()
      Extracts frozen split factors and the master component slate from the base-case run.
      Returns:
      this extractor (fluent), with results available via the getters

    • isNodeUnit

      private boolean isNodeUnit(ProcessEquipmentInterface unit)
      Determines whether a unit acts as a node (mixing/splitting point) in the proxy network. Streams are edges, not nodes; a node must expose at least one outlet stream.
      Parameters:
      unit - the unit to test; must be non-null
      Returns:
      true if the unit is a network node

    • buildMasterSlate

      private void buildMasterSlate()
      Builds the master component slate (union of component names) and per-component molar masses by scanning every node unit's inlet and outlet streams.

    • collectComponents

      private void collectComponents(List<StreamInterface> streams)
      Registers all component names (and molar masses) found in a list of streams into the master slate, preserving first-seen order.
      Parameters:
      streams - the streams to scan; must be non-null

    • buildUnitSplits

      private void buildUnitSplits()
      Builds a UnitSplit for every node unit using the master component slate.

    • componentFlow

      static double componentFlow(StreamInterface stream, String componentName)
      Gets the total molar flow of a named component in a stream (mole/sec), or zero if the component is not present in that stream.
      Parameters:
      stream - the stream to read; must be non-null
      componentName - the component name to look up; must be non-null
      Returns:
      the component molar flow in mole/sec, or 0.0 if absent

    • safeInlets

      private static List<StreamInterface> safeInlets(ProcessEquipmentInterface unit)
      Returns the inlet streams of a unit, never throwing.
      Parameters:
      unit - the unit; must be non-null
      Returns:
      the inlet streams, or an empty list if not available

    • safeOutlets

      private static List<StreamInterface> safeOutlets(ProcessEquipmentInterface unit)
      Returns the outlet streams of a unit, never throwing.
      Parameters:
      unit - the unit; must be non-null
      Returns:
      the outlet streams, or an empty list if not available

    • getProcess

      public ProcessSystem getProcess()
      Gets the base-case process system.
      Returns:
      the process system

    • getComponentNames

      public List<String> getComponentNames()
      Gets the master component slate (union of all component names across the process).
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of component names

    • getMolarMass

      public double getMolarMass(String componentName)
      Gets the molar mass (kg/mol) of a component on the master slate.
      Parameters:
      componentName - the component name; must be on the master slate
      Returns:
      the molar mass in kg/mol, or 0.0 if unknown

    • getUnitSplits

      public Map<String,UnitSplit> getUnitSplits()
      Gets the frozen split factors per unit, keyed by unit name.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable, insertion-ordered map of unit splits

    • getNodeUnits

      public List<ProcessEquipmentInterface> getNodeUnits()
      Gets the node units participating in the proxy network, in process order.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of node units
